headline: Goldman Pitches Investors on Loans to Their Own Private Funds

headline: Wall Street Lunch: Trump Demands 20% Hormuz Protection Fee
summary: President Donald Trump escalated U.S. involvement in the Strait of Hormuz, announcing a 20% reimbursement fee on all cargo shipped through the critical waterway.
